Source   Edit  

Types

ReadState = object
  pos*: int
Source   Edit   
SomeBuffer = typed
Source   Edit   
SomeReader = typed
Source   Edit   
TrackedReadState = object
  pos*: int
  doLineColumn*: bool = true
  line*, column*: int
Source   Edit  

Consts

holoReaderLineColumn {.booldefine.} = true
enables/disables line column tracking by default for tracked state, has very little impact on performance Source   Edit   
holoReaderMatchStrEqualMem {.booldefine.} = false
possible minor optimization, can be faster on reduced instruction sets Source   Edit   
holoReaderPeekStrCopyMem {.booldefine.} = false
possible minor optimization, can be faster on reduced instruction sets Source   Edit   
holoReaderUseViews {.booldefine.} = false
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc initReadState(): ReadState {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc initReadState(doLineColumn: bool): ReadState {.inline,
    ...deprecated: "line column option is ignored, use tracked read state",
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Deprecated: line column option is ignored, use tracked read state
Source   Edit   
proc initTrackedReadState(doLineColumn = holoReaderLineColumn): TrackedReadState {.
    inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc startRead(state: var ReadState) {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc startRead(state: var TrackedReadState) {.inline, ...raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Source   Edit
